title: Add real-world corpus files for differential testing
description: Populate testdata/corpora/ with version-pinned real-world source files for differential testing, as specified in testing-strategy.md Section 4. Include: (1) JSON: ~20 package.json files from npm (varied structure, nested objects), (2) Go: ~20 files from Go standard library src/, (3) JavaScript: ~20 files from top npm packages, (4) Python: ~20 files from CPython stdlib, (5) Rust: ~20 files from the Rust compiler source. Create a script (cmd/fetch-corpora or testdata/fetch_corpora.sh) to download these at pinned versions. Add TestDifferential<Language> tests that parse each file with both Go parser and C tree-sitter CLI, comparing S-expressions. Add Makefile target: make test-differential. Reference: docs/testing-strategy.md Section 4.
